task.name: Web Frontend Layout Refactor
task.description: Refactor the web frontend from inefficient two-column layout to optimized three-column layout that eliminates wasted space and scrolling

vision_extraction.primary_goal: Efficiently utilize screen space and eliminate unnecessary scrolling in the web frontend
success_criteria: Grid canvas uses available space efficiently
deliverables: Responsive square grid canvas with max size

context.gap_analysis_summary: Current layout has hardcoded 600x600 grid in 2-column layout leaving ~700px empty gap, 6 stacked sidebar panels requiring scroll. Need complete layout restructure.

phases.name: Layout Refactor
phases.description: Complete layout restructure to three-column design
phases.exit_criteria: All features pass, no scrolling at 1280x800

features.name: Three-column grid structure
features.description: Replace grid-cols-[1fr_300px] with three-column layout: info (~200px) | grid (1fr) | charts (~320px)

functional: App.tsx uses three-column CSS grid or flexbox
Columns sized appropriately at 1280px and 1920px viewports

features.name: Responsive square grid canvas
features.description: Make GridCanvas responsive with square aspect ratio and max size (~600px)

features.name: Controls in header
features.description: Move play/pause/step/reset buttons and speed slider to header row

features.name: Compact metrics display
features.description: Reorganize metrics into compact 2x2 grid layout in left column

functional: Tick, Trades, Welfare, Gains all visible
Takes less vertical space than current

features.name: Charts in right column
features.description: Place Welfare and Trades charts in right column (320px), stacked vertically with responsive height

features.name: Trade History modal
features.description: Move Trade History from sidebar to modal accessed via History button in header

functional: Button to open Trade History modal

features.name: Remove Selected Agent panel
features.description: Remove dedicated Selected Agent panel from sidebar (tooltip on hover is sufficient)

functional: No Selected Agent panel in layout
Hover tooltip still shows agent details
Click selection still works for perception radius overlay

resolved.choice: CSS Grid with grid-cols-[auto_200px_300px] or similar
resolved.rationale: Provides clear separation of concerns: simulation view, quick info, detailed charts

resolved.choice: Square aspect ratio with max-width: 550px, responsive to container
resolved.rationale: Grid cells should be square, but canvas shouldn't dominate at large viewports
Trade history can be long, modal prevents layout disruption
